name: Masalewala Murgh- Spicy Grilled Chicken - India
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tsp chili powder, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat grill and arrange grilling tray at least 5-6 inches from the source of heat (medium-high).
2. Combine all ingredients for the spice paste in a bowl and mix.
3. Rub the past over chicken as evenly as possible.
4. Arrange chicken on the grilling tray in a single layer with fleshier parts up and skin down.
5. Grill for 10-12 minutes or until brown. You may need to rearrange some pieces so that they brown evenly.
6. Turn and cook for another 10-12 minutes on the other side, adjusting as needed.
